summary: Iteration 100 — Tested God-Mode CEO Transactions feed. Backend Stripe endpoints all pass (stats returns this_month.count=1 total=10220¢, transactions returns 5 Stripe rows with correct fee breakdown, 9 churches including Eden). Frontend PlatformTransactions renders correctly under /godmode (Transactions tab) with live/demo toggle, source=live by default (indigo), live row 0 shows all 10 columns correctly formatted ($102.20 / $3.26 stripe fee / $0.36 solomon fee / $98.58 net / succeeded · TEST / Visa ••••4242). Church and status filters both work. Two notable issues: (1) STATS CARDS DID NOT RENDER on the frontend despite the /stats endpoint returning valid data via curl — data-testid='platform-stats-cards' not found after 6s wait; (2) /platform/transactions URL per the spec does NOT route to PlatformTransactions — the component is only reachable via /godmode with the Transactions tab. A 'Welcome, Solomon! Quick Tour' modal overlay appears on /godmode and may have blocked demo toggle activation (row count stayed at 13 after clicking demo, and the demo button never got the bg-slate-900 active class).

ui_bugs.issue: [data-testid='platform-stats-cards'] does not render on the Transactions tab even though /api/platform/stripe/transactions/stats returns HTTP 200 with valid payload (verified via curl). Likely the stats fetch is failing in-browser, or the `stats` state is never populated. No stats headline is visible above the filter row in the rendered UI.

An 'I will figure it out myself' / 'Start Quick Tour' modal appears on first render and intercepts pointer events. In automation this prevented the Demo toggle click from switching source (row count remained 13 matching Live). Please auto-dismiss for platform_admin or add a backdrop close.

integration_issues.issue: Review request specifies navigating to /platform/transactions, but that URL renders the legacy PlatformDashboard.jsx (its own internal transactions view). The new PlatformTransactions.jsx is only rendered as the 'Transactions' TAB inside GodModeDashboard at /godmode. Either add a React-Router route at /platform/transactions mapping to the new component, or update the spec/entrypoint.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration errors: <span> child of <tr>/<tbody> and <th> child of <span> from visual-editor wrappers. Not introduced by this iteration.

action_items: HIGH: Debug why [data-testid='platform-stats-cards'] does not appear in PlatformTransactions despite backend stats endpoint returning valid data. Check network tab in-browser for 401/403 or CORS on /api/platform/stripe/transactions/stats; verify token is included on the fetch; consider rendering a placeholder stats card rather than hiding the block when stats===null.
HIGH: Wire a real route for /platform/transactions (or redirect to /godmode?tab=transactions). The spec, main agent tests, and regression scripts all assume /platform/transactions is the entry URL.
MEDIUM: The 'Welcome, Solomon!' Quick Tour modal blocks interactions on first visit to /godmode. Auto-dismiss when role==platform_admin or ensure it has a data-testid='tour-skip' and is non-blocking.
LOW: Pre-existing React hydration warnings on /platform dashboard (<span> inside <tr>/<tbody>) — carry-over from prior iterations.
critical_code_review_comments: stripe_elements.py stats endpoint: amounts in cents, solomon_revenue at 0.35% computed correctly (10220 * 0.0035 = 35.77 -> rounds to 36). All aggregate buckets (today/this_week/this_month/all_time) + active_churches + total_donors returned correctly.

stripe_elements.py transactions endpoint: each row correctly returns id, church_name, church_slug, donor_name, amount, stripe_fee, solomon_fee (0.35%), church_net (amount - stripe_fee - solomon_fee), status, created_at, card_brand, card_last4, test_mode. Fee math verified cent-precise for $102.20 donations: stripe_fee=326 (2.9% + 30c of 10220 = 296.38+30=326.38 -> 326), solomon_fee=36 (0.35% of 10220 = 35.77 -> 36), church_net=10220-326-36=9858. Good.

PlatformTransactions.jsx: stats block conditionally rendered `{stats && ...}` — if fetch fails silently (catch swallows errors) the CEO cards are invisible. Recommend rendering loading skeleton or error state.
Route coverage in App.js: no /platform/transactions route exists — PlatformTransactions is rendered only as a tab in GodModeDashboard. Mismatch with review request.
PlatformTransactions filter dropdowns: the Status select has no data-testid (only the church select does). Recommend adding [data-testid='txn-filter-status'] for future automation.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (tab UI, toggle, row data, filters all working; stats cards missing; /platform/transactions direct URL doesn't route)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PlatformTransactions is reached via /godmode -> Transactions tab (click the 'Transactions' button in TABS bar). Use page.evaluate to click since text selectors matched sidebar links. Welcome tour modal appears on first /godmode visit and blocks clicks — dismiss it first via 'I will figure it out myself' text before interacting with the toggle. Backend stats endpoint returns buckets keyed as today/this_week/this_month/all_time with total_amount in CENTS. All 13 live rows visible are real Stripe test-mode PaymentIntents for Eden. When Status filter='succeeded' applied, rows drop to 7. Stats cards data-testid not rendering is a real frontend bug worth RCA.
rca of the issue: Stats cards bug RCA: /api/platform/stripe/transactions/stats returns HTTP 200 via curl with full body. Frontend code at PlatformTransactions.jsx line 36-51 does `if (sRes.ok) setStats(await sRes.json());` inside a try/catch that swallows errors silently. Suggest adding a console.error in the catch + rendering a skeleton when stats===null so this is obvious. To reproduce: login as admin@solomonai.us, go to /godmode, click Transactions tab, inspect DOM for [data-testid='platform-stats-cards'] — it's not present. Route bug RCA: /app/frontend/src/App.js line 114-128 defines /platform -> PlatformDashboard (old component), and line 129 /godmode -> GodModeDashboard (which owns PlatformTransactions). There is no /platform/transactions route at all. Fix: add `<Route path='transactions' element={<PlatformTransactions token={sessionStorage.getItem('session_token')} />} />` nested under /platform, or rename the spec to use /godmode.
